nasb.text: And a man named Joseph, who was a member of the Council, a good and righteous man

esv.text: Now there was a man named Joseph, from the Jewish town of Arimathea. He was a member of the council, a good and righteous man,

cnv.text: 有一個人名叫約瑟，是個議員，為人良善公義，

ccb.text: 有一位名叫约瑟的公会议员心地善良、为人正直，

csbs.text: 当时，有一个名叫约瑟的人，是犹太议会中的议员，为人公义良善。
